message:
fix: resolve 8 test failures across 8 modules

Root causes and fixes:
- connector_credential_broker: CredentialScope::is_subset_of now supports
  prefix glob patterns (e.g. "channels/*" matches "channels/alerts"),
  not just full wildcard "*"
- policy: credential actions authorized by the broker gate skip the
  generic is_destructive() approval check, preventing double-gating
- dancing_links: from_matrix_single_cell_false assertion corrected to
  expect num_rows()=1 (row index reserved even for all-false rows)
- ars_generalize: matches_safety_regex rejects empty patterns (prevents
  empty regex matching everything)
- events: match_rule_glob_star_prefix assertions corrected (*.error
  should match gemini.error, not codex.warning)
- native_events: stale socket test uses std::os::unix::net::UnixListener
  instead of async bind (which cleans up socket on drop)
- plan: tx_surface_synthetic_commit_report tx_id assertion corrected to
  match sample_tx_contract ("tx:test" not "tx:robot-interface-test")
- approval: audit_record_fields_populated actor_kind assertion corrected
  to "robot" (matching base_input() ActorKind::Robot)

Verified: 1092 tests pass across all affected modules, 0 regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
